name: Reading Athletics Track
metaTitle: Palmer Park Stadium Reading | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and track information for Palmer Park Stadium in Reading.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Mon–Fri 06:30–22:00, Sat–Sun 08:00–18:00. Note the track is used for club sessions and may have restricted public access.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Casual track use is available for approximately £6.50 (£4.60 for residents). Included for Better monthly members.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A 400m synthetic track within Palmer Park. The facility provides high jump beds and long jump equipment for users.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: On-site parking is available within the Palmer Park grounds. Always check local signage for parking rules upon arrival.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Better page for Palmer Park Stadium for track timetables and booking.
